caption: A person with light hair, wearing a black t-shirt, is seen in a small picture-in-picture window over a video game interface for "ULTIMATE TEAM". The game screen shows a "STORE" menu with a "TRAINING" tab selected, featuring several digital player cards with ratings of "90 OVR", "85 OVR", and "84 OVR". On-screen text includes "ZERO CHILL PLAYER" and "ALL MADDEN PLAYER" alongside various currency values. At the top of the interface, indicators show "LV 20" and a "91" rating. The person in the window is reacting with expressive facial movements and hand gestures; they start with a neutral expression, move their hand up in a waving motion, and eventually open their mouth wide and raise both hands as if shouting or reacting with surprise. A small portion of a gaming controller is visible on the right side of the person's window.
